Module 7 - Lesson 1
Overview Of The Follow-Up Sequences:
1
2 	3 	4 	5 	6 	7
8

-- 1 of 9 --

Module 7 - Lesson 1
Overview Of The Follow-Up Sequences:
1
2 	3 	4 	5 	6 	7
8
1. List 0 	- The Prospect Follow-Up Sequence
This is the autoresponder sequence that is triggered when a prospect opts-in and
doesn’t buy the Customer Captivation Offer. It’s designed to stimulate purchase
of the Customer Captivation Offer.

-- 2 of 9 --

Module 7 - Lesson 1
Overview Of The Follow-Up Sequences:
1
2 	3 	4 	5 	6 	7
8
2. List C 	- The Main Customer Thank You Sequence
This is the autoresponder sequence that is triggered when a prospect buys the
Customer Captivation Offer and is designed to motivate consumption and drive
to the Bonus Webinar.

-- 3 of 9 --

Module 7 - Lesson 1
Overview Of The Follow-Up Sequences:
1
2 	3 	4 	5 	6 	7
8
3. List 1 	- The Customer Captivation & SC Sequence
This is the autoresponder sequence that is triggered when a prospect buys the
Customer Captivation Offer and is designed to thank the customer for their
purchase and provide a Second-Chance Offer for the Reverse Add-On Offer.

-- 4 of 9 --

Module 7 - Lesson 1
Overview Of The Follow-Up Sequences:
1
2 	3 	4 	5 	6 	7
8
4. List 2 	- The Reverse 	Add-On & SC Sequence
This is the autoresponder sequence that is triggered when a buyer takes the
Reverse Add-On Offer and is designed to thank the customer for their purchase
and provide a Second-Chance Offer for the Soft Add-On Offer.

-- 5 of 9 --

Module 7 - Lesson 1
Overview Of The Follow-Up Sequences:
1
2 	3 	4 	5 	6 	7
8
5. List 3 	- The Soft 	Add-On & SC Sequence
This is the autoresponder sequence that is triggered when a buyer takes the Soft
Add-On Offer and is designed to thank the customer for their purchase and
provide a Second-Chance Offer for the Mid-Tier Add-On Offer.

-- 6 of 9 --

Module 7 - Lesson 1
Overview Of The Follow-Up Sequences:
1
2 	3 	4 	5 	6 	7
8
6. List 4 	- The Mid-Tier 	Add-On & SC Sequence
This is the autoresponder sequence that is triggered when a buyer takes the Mid-
Tier Add-On Offer and is designed to thank the customer for their purchase and
provide a Second-Chance Offer for the Thank You Page “Gift Offer”.

-- 7 of 9 --

Module 7 - Lesson 1
Overview Of The Follow-Up Sequences:
1
2 	3 	4 	5 	6 	7
8
7. List 5 	- The Thank You Page “Gift Offer” Sequence
This is the autoresponder sequence that is triggered when a buyer takes the
Thank You Page “Gift Offer” and is designed to thank the customer for their
purchase and provide access details.

-- 8 of 9 --

Module 7 - Lesson 1
Overview Of The Follow-Up Sequences:
1
2 	3 	4 	5 	6 	7
8
8. List 6 	- The Premium Offer Thank You Sequence
This is the autoresponder sequence that is triggered when a customer takes the
Premium Webinar Offer and is designed to thank the customer for their purchase
and motivate consumption.

-- 9 of 9 --
